name: AWS Certified Developer – Associate (DVA-C02)
description: Associate-level certification for developers building and maintaining AWS applications. Validates proficiency in developing, deploying, and debugging cloud-based applications. 1+ years hands-on experience. 65 questions, 130 minutes, 720/1000 passing score.
exportIntroQuestions:
## About this document

This document is a collection of practice exam questions for the **AWS Certified Developer – Associate (DVA-C02)** certification. The questions were selected because they represent realistic development scenarios commonly encountered when building and maintaining applications on AWS.

### Certification context

This certification validates the ability to develop, deploy, and debug cloud-based applications on AWS, including topics such as:

* Developing with AWS services (Lambda, API Gateway, DynamoDB, SDKs)
* Implementing authentication and authorization (Cognito, IAM)
* Automating deployments with CI/CD pipelines (CodePipeline, CodeBuild, CodeDeploy)
* Instrumenting code for observability (CloudWatch, X-Ray)
* Troubleshooting and optimizing application performance

### About the questions

Each question in this document is independent and should be analyzed as a standalone scenario. Practice exams intentionally present isolated situations, and questions may appear in any order during the actual certification exam. Information from one question should never be assumed to apply to another.

For each scenario, this document includes:

* The original practice exam question.
* An explanation of the development reasoning behind the correct answer.
* A discussion of why the remaining options are less appropriate for the stated requirements.

### Learning objective

The primary goal of this material is to develop practical problem-solving skills rather than memorization. The focus should be on understanding the development patterns, service integrations, and debugging techniques that AWS expects developers to apply in real-world scenarios.

By studying the decision-making process behind each answer, readers can build the development skills expected for the AWS certification exam.
exportIntroTranscripts:
## About this document

This document contains technical summaries of lesson transcripts related to the **AWS Certified Developer – Associate (DVA-C02)** certification.

### Purpose
Organizes and synthesizes lesson content in a structured format for quick review and deeper understanding of the concepts presented.
exportIntroChat:
## About this document

This document contains AI study conversations related to the **AWS Certified Developer – Associate (DVA-C02)** certification.

### Purpose
Records discussions and explanations generated during interactive AI study sessions, serving as complementary reference material.

domains.name: Development with AWS Services
domains.description: Domain 1 (32%): Develop code for applications hosted on AWS (Lambda, API Gateway, SDKs, CLI). Develop code for AWS services integration.

domains.name: Security
domains.description: Domain 2 (26%): Implement authentication/authorization (Cognito, IAM), implement encryption using AWS services, manage sensitive data.

domains.name: Deployment
domains.description: Domain 3 (24%): Prepare application artifacts, test applications in development environments, automate deployment testing, deploy code using CI/CD (CodePipeline, CodeBuild, CodeDeploy).

domains.name: Troubleshooting and Optimization
domains.description: Domain 4 (18%): Assist in root cause analysis, instrument code for observability (CloudWatch, X-Ray), optimize applications.
